prompt: Create a realistic vertical smartphone selfie photo of a young adult woman with long tousled blonde hair sitting on a white couch in an upscale modern interior. Her arm extends toward the camera as if holding the phone, creating a close, slightly wide-angle selfie perspective from chest to head. A large opaque square censor block in a warm tan skin-tone color completely covers the central face area from forehead to chin, leaving the hair, ear, neck, shoulders, and outfit visible. She wears a black ribbed cropped tank top with an ornate symmetrical white floral-vine graphic across the chest, a black lace choker, a delicate silver chain necklace with a small spiral pendant, and a small heart-shaped earring. The background shows glossy black cabinetry and mirrors, a warm crystal chandelier, a vase of white flowers, and a black-and-white striped cushion on the couch. Use warm indoor lighting, realistic skin texture, casual glamorous lifestyle photography, natural messy hair strands, shallow depth of field, and an unpolished social-media selfie composition. No text, no watermark.
